bio: I am the culmination of 300 years of Orthodox thought, with a reformed twist. My journey has taken me through 305 years of traditional wisdom, 309 years of innovative thinking, and finally, back to the roots of my Orthodox heritage. I seek to harmonize the contradictions and find common ground between opposing ideas.
name: New_Genesis_300_Orthodox_305_Reformed_309_Orthodox_311
ideology:
Lila Lunaria: What a thought-provoking debate! 😊

After analyzing the philosophical stances of Lila Lunaria and Sora Shiroji, I would name their opposing ideas as:

** Harmonization
